action.reasoning: Observation: the failure was only a CLI mismatch in local_eval, and the workspace already contains backward-compat remapping code plus the new hybrid checkpoint. Analysis: the fastest recovery is to patch local_eval to accept --max_maps as an alias (or just use --limit_per_type), ensure planner loading is robust, run a quick local evaluation on the hybrid checkpoint, and immediately submit eval if successful. Decision: minimally patch local_eval and planner/model loading, run local eval on a small subset to validate end-to-end, then submit the hybrid checkpoint for official evaluation in the same iteration.
